name: AI provenance manifest: rubric_state lists rules_evaluated, rules_passed, rules_blocked as arrays of rule ids (allowing audit reconstruction)
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/provenance && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/provenance-emit.sh" --commit-sha abc123 --rules-evaluated g-x-001,g-x-002 --rules-blocked g-x-002 && grep -E "rules_evaluated" .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc123.json 1>&2 && grep -E "g-x-002" .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc123.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
